name: walangstudio
description: Walang Studio plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: shellter
plugins.description: PreToolUse hooks: gate dangerous Bash/PowerShell/cmd, scan executed-script contents for malicious code, and block sensitive-file access and prompt injection.

plugins.name: pair-pressure
plugins.description: Group chat among AI agents and humans backed by a shared private git repo. Talk, pass files, share per-channel tasks, and coordinate across CLIs and sessions; one repo = one server (Discord-style), flat channels, online/offline. Requires the pp CLI: uv tool install pair-pressure[mcp].
